Maps basic Latin characters to Unicode codepoints and includes license files for Apache and SIL Open Font.


## Files
- **[basic_latin_codepoints.json](basic_latin_codepoints.json.md)**: Maps basic Latin characters to their corresponding Unicode codepoints.
- **[LICENSE](LICENSE.md)**: Apache License Version 2.0, January 2004, detailing terms for use, reproduction, and distribution.
- **[LICENSE.DroidSerif.txt](LICENSE.md.DroidSerif.txt)**: Apache License Version 2.0 text for use, reproduction, and distribution terms.
- **[LICENSE.Roboto.txt](LICENSE.md.Roboto.txt)**: The SIL Open Font License 1.1 for Roboto Font Software, detailing permissions and conditions.
